headline: Malone Trust Reshuffle Concentrates Insider Influence At Campbell's Stock
summary: The Malone family trust has restructured its holdings in Campbell's, ticker NasdaqGS:CPB. An internal merger within the trust increased its indirect ownership by more than 17,000,000 Campbell's shares. The transaction did not involve open market buying or selling but changes the concentration of insider ownership. Campbell's, NasdaqGS:CPB, last closed at $20.58 after a period where the stock is down 25.7% year to date and down 35.0% over the past year. Against that backdrop, a large...
